meta.title: SmartPOS - Fast Billing and Shop Management for Small Businesses
meta.description: A smart, easy-to-use POS system for small shops built for fast sales, simple stock control, and zero hassle.

hero.description: Run sales, track stock, and get instant business insights from one smart POS system built for groceries, bookshops, clothing shops, and more.
hero.subtext: Runs on phone, tablet, or desktop - no bulky setup or extra hardware.

dashboard.aiInsightMessage: Biscuit sales increased 18% this week. Consider restocking soon.

items: Works on Phone, Tablet, or Desktop

features.description: Simple selling, stock control, and AI-powered insights in one modern POS.

items.title: One-Screen Checkout
items.description: Tap, sell, and complete payments from one clean screen.

items.title: AI Stock Alerts
items.description: Know what's running low before it becomes a problem.

items.title: Smart Sales Insights
items.description: See what sold, what slowed down, and what needs attention.

items.title: Works on Devices You Already Own
items.description: Use your phone, tablet, or computer - no expensive setup required.

items.title: Setup in Minutes

items.title: Built for Real Small Shops
items.description: Designed for groceries, bookshops, boutiques, and everyday retail.

ai.description: SmartPOS helps you understand your business faster with low-stock alerts, sales summaries, smart search, and instant answers.

insights.text: Milk Powder is likely to run out tomorrow.
Biscuits sold better than last week. Consider restocking soon.

liveDemo.description: Try realistic low-stock, best/worst seller, and smart report questions using seeded read-only demo data.
liveDemo.sandboxNotice: Sandbox API mode will be available in a later release. Use Mock Data for now.

cards.title: Low stock check
cards.query: Show items below stock level 10 right now.
cards.summary: 4 items are below threshold 10. Highest risk: Milk Powder (2 units), Ballpoint Pen Blue (6 units), A4 Exercise Book (8 units), and Dish Soap 500ml (9 units).

cards.title: Best vs worst sellers
cards.query: What sold best and worst this week?
cards.summary: Best seller this week: Biscuits Family Pack (net qty 184). Lowest performer: Stapler Pins Small (net qty 7). Suggested action: bundle stapler pins with notebooks near checkout.

cards.title: Smart report preview
cards.query: Generate a monthly smart report summary with restock guidance.
cards.summary: Monthly net sales trend is +9.4%. Forecast for next month is Rs. 1,240,000 net sales. Focus restock increase on milk powder and family biscuits; keep stationery reorder at current level.

steps.title: Let AI Assist
